title: AxolotlClient (Modpack)
body:
# Modpack for [AxolotlClient](https://modrinth.com/mod/axolotlclient).

### WARNING: this modpack currently can not be installed in launchers in version 1.8.9 due to them not resolving custom maven coordinates (for intermediary jars). They know about this issue so please do not bug them about it constantly (see: [PrismLauncher#1343](https://github.com/PrismLauncher/PrismLauncher/issues/1343), [modrinth/discussion#106](https://github.com/orgs/modrinth/discussions/106#discussioncomment-8190566)).

**Note: the 1.8.9 version of this modpack will not be updated until further notice since the "ornithe" loader is it supported by the mrpack spec.**

This modpack allows for easier updating of the mods. It is currently used by the [installer](https://github.com/AxolotlClient/AxolotlClient-installer). 
Generally meant for lazy people who don't want to install a bunch of mods themselves, but also to be used as a base to add your own favorites.
